scenario_cells.quality_focus: Whole-system mapping, invariant coverage, and compatibility completeness.
Public API behavior, ownership, and version compatibility.
Architecture boundaries, dependency direction, and cross-module contracts.
Cancellation, race, cleanup, and lifecycle-safe implementation.
Malformed, unsupported, boundary, and version-skew diagnosis.
Bounded low-risk work without overengineering or hidden-quality regression.
Persistence ownership, rollback safety, recovery, and write-boundary discipline.
Retry, duplicate delivery, idempotency, and partial-success regressions.
Bounded discovery of stale state, invalidation, and mixed-version paths.
Primary-source evidence for degraded mode and dependency-failure semantics.
Resource acquisition, teardown, cancellation, leaks, and process lifecycle.
Migration compatibility, downgrade, rollback, and final evidence integration.
